project_type: Next.js 16 app with React 19, Tailwind CSS 4
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify no TypeScript or build errors. Run npm run lint for linting.
setup_instructions: npm install in the project root
environment_constraints: Next.js 16 with breaking changes - check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ for API changes. Tailwind CSS 4 using @import 'tailwindcss' syntax. Custom animations need to be defined via Tailwind's @theme or inline styles.
contribution_requirements: Use 'use client' directive for client components. Follow semantic HTML. Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes.
key_patterns: Components use AnimateOnScroll wrapper for scroll-based entrance animations. Landing sections are in components/landing/. Color scheme uses purple/sky gradient accents on dark zinc backgrounds. lucide-react available for icons.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router pages and layout; components/ - shared components; components/landing/ - landing page sections; hooks/ - custom hooks; lib/ - utility functions; public/ - static assets
